notes: Section, , , provided for the leasing of an additional tract of land or coal deposit, not to exceed 2560 acres, upon a showing by a lessee that all workable deposits of coal would be exhausted, worked out, or removed within three years thereafter.act Feb. 25, 1920, ch. 85, § 441 Stat. 439
